    Classes in org.episteme.core.mathematics.linearalgebra.providers that implement AlgorithmProvider
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CARMALinearAlgebraProvider<E extends Field<E>>
    Linear Algebra Provider that forces the use of the CARMA algorithm.
    class 
    ColtLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
    Colt Linear Algebra Provider.
    class 
    CommonsMathLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
    Commons Math Linear Algebra Provider.
    class 
    CPUDenseLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
     
    class 
    CPUSparseLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
    Linear Algebra Provider for Sparse Matrices (CPU).
    class 
    DistributedLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
    Linear algebra provider that delegates to distributed algorithms when appropriate.
    class 
    EJMLLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
    EJML Linear Algebra Provider.
    class 
    JBlasLinearAlgebraProvider<E>
    JBlas Linear Algebra Provider.
    class 
    ND4JLinearAlgebraProvider
    ND4J Linear Algebra Provider (Dense).
    class 
    StandardLinearAlgebraProvider<E extends Field<E>>
    Linear Algebra Provider that forces the use of the Standard (Naive/Recursive) algorithm.
    class 
    StrassenLinearAlgebraProvider<E extends Field<E>>
    Linear Algebra Provider that forces the use of the Strassen algorithm.

    Subinterfaces of AlgorithmProvider in org.episteme.core.technical.algorithm
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    BayesianInferenceProvider
    Service provider interface for Bayesian Inference.
    interface 
    FEMProvider
    Interface for Finite Element Method (FEM) providers.
    interface 
    FFTProvider
    Service provider interface for Fast Fourier Transform operations.
    interface 
    GeneticAlgorithmProvider
    Interface for Genetic Algorithm providers.
    interface 
    GraphAlgorithmProvider
    Service provider interface for graph algorithms.
    interface 
    LatticeBoltzmannProvider
    Interface for Lattice Boltzmann Method (LBM) providers.
    interface 
    MandelbrotProvider
    Interface for Mandelbrot set generation providers.
    interface 
    MaxwellProvider
    Interface for Maxwell's Equations providers.
    interface 
    MLProvider
    Service Provider Interface for high-performance Machine Learning operations.
    interface 
    MolecularDynamicsProvider
    Interface for Molecular Dynamics (MD) simulation providers.
    interface 
    MonteCarloProvider
    Interface for Monte Carlo integration and estimation providers.
    interface 
    NavierStokesProvider
    Interface for Navier-Stokes Fluid Dynamics providers.
    interface 
    NBodyProvider
    Interface for N-Body simulation providers.
    interface 
    ODEProvider
    Interface for Ordinary Differential Equation (ODE) solvers.
    interface 
    SCFProvider
    Interface for Hartree-Fock Self-Consistent Field (SCF) providers.
    interface 
    SimulationProvider
    Service provider interface for discrete-event and continuous simulations.
    interface 
    SPHFluidProvider
    Interface for Smoothed Particle Hydrodynamics (SPH) fluid simulation providers.
    interface 
    TensorProvider
    Service provider interface for tensor operations.
    interface 
    WaveProvider
    Interface for Wave Equation simulation providers.
    Methods in org.episteme.core.technical.algorithm with type parameters of type AlgorithmProvider
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <P extends AlgorithmProvider>
    P
    AlgorithmManager.getProvider(Class<P> providerClass)
    Finds and returns the best available provider for the given interface.
    static <P extends AlgorithmProvider>
    List<P>
    AlgorithmManager.getProviders(Class<P> providerClass)
    Finds and returns all available providers for the given interface, sorted by priority.
    static <P extends AlgorithmProvider>
    P
    ProviderSelector.select(Class<P> providerClass)
    Selects using static priority (delegates to AlgorithmManager).
    static <P extends AlgorithmProvider>
    P
    ProviderSelector.select(Class<P> providerClass, OperationContext context)
    Selects the best provider for the given operation context.
